data.revised_prompt: Create a simplified, clean HD 2D game monster concept for a cultivation roguelite: a thunder tribulation demon general, humanoid elite/boss silhouette, three-quarter RPG view, full body visible, centered with generous padding, battle-ready idle pose, clear feet anchor, subject occupies about 68% of the canvas. The monster should keep a premium hand-painted xianxia boss feeling but be more game-readable: reduce armor filigree, floating objects, and texture noise; crisp silhouette; simplified fine details; compact horned helm; masked face; dark forged armor with a few clear lightning cracks; simplified tattered robe panels; clawed gauntlets; two or three small floating talismans at most; compact electric aura; controlled internal blue lightning glow; storm-lit rim light; dramatic but readable contrast. Palette: charcoal black, storm blue, electric cyan, muted steel; avoid magenta in the subject. Materials/textures: forged dark metal, scorched cloth, controlled lightning fissures. Style: clean HD hand-painted 2D game monster concept, polished fantasy RPG asset, not photorealistic, not 3D, not pixel art. Composition: single monster only, no extra enemies, no UI, no text, no watermark, no giant floating debris, no oversized lightning arcs, no giant wings. Background must be a perfectly flat solid chroma-key #FF00FF only, uniform color, no shadows, no gradients, no texture, no floor plane, no lighting variation.
